children.text: Travel and transportation allowances paid to members that are unauthorized or in excess of authorized amounts: requirement for repayment

Except as provided in subsection (b), a member of the uniformed services or other person who is paid travel and transportation allowances under subchapter I shall repay to the United States any amount of such payment that is determined to be unauthorized or in excess of the applicable authorized amount.

children.tail: shall specify procedures for determining the circumstances under which an exception to repayment otherwise required by subsection (a) may be granted.

children.text: An obligation to repay the United States under this section is, for all purposes, a debt owed the United States. A discharge in bankruptcy under title 11 does not discharge a person from such debt if the discharge order is entered less than five years after the date on which the debt was incurred.
Pub. L. 112–81, div. A, title VI, § 631(b)
